title: Running Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock
summary: AWS Developers walkthrough on running Claude Code through Amazon Bedrock to keep data within AWS infrastructure for compliance and residency requirements. Covers environment setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking, and Bedrock Guardrails.
writeup: This tutorial walks through running Anthropic's agentic coding tool Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock so that data stays within AWS infrastructure. It covers environment setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, and the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, along with cost tracking. Content governance is handled through Bedrock Guardrails. The takeaway: teams can operate Claude Code inside their existing AWS boundary while managing spend and enforcing content moderation.
